backend._comment: Backend (llama.cpp) downloaded on first run, matched to the GPU. Whole zips from the official releases so server+libs are same build.

model._comment: Optional starter model, OFFERED on first run (only downloaded if the user says yes). Mistral-7B-Instruct v0.3: Apache 2.0, European (Mistral AI, FR), NON-reasoning, solid all-rounder with mature llama.cpp support. Aligns with the manifesto (European-first, Apache-preferred). Q4_K_M ~4.37 GB - fits an 8GB PC (slower on CPU-only; the [Mistral-7B] ini section carries its launch flags).
model.name: Mistral-7B-Instruct-v0.3-Q4_K_M.gguf
